input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the accumulator container(s) must be removable from the vehicle while still remaining rules

            rule EV.4.3.2: The Accumulator Container(s) must be removable from the vehicle while still remaining rules
EV.4.3.2 The Accumulator Container(s) must be removable from the vehicle while still remaining rules 
compliant

final_answer: The Accumulator Container(s) must be removable from the vehicle while still remaining rules compliant
